skills.name: Agent Directory
skills.description: Audit agent registry for overlap; gate new agent creation. Maintenance mode reports duplicates; creation mode recommends extend vs new vs skill extraction.

skills.name: Clarification Protocol
skills.description: Batch clarifying questions upfront when blocked on ambiguous input. Returns structured JSON with questions and explicit assumptions. Use before proceeding when critical information is missing.

skills.name: Daily Compact
skills.description: Compacts and organises daily brain dumps — daily notes, tasks, and inbox captures. Removes or archives stale completed and overdue tasks. Use when the user invokes daily compact, asks to compact their brain dump, tidy daily notes, or prune old tasks.

skills.name: Github Commit
skills.description: Auto-commit at natural checkpoints with conventional commit messages. Gates agent and skill instruction changes behind a required human explanation and changelog entry. Use when a feature reaches working state, tests pass, refactor completes, or scaffold is laid down.

skills.name: Ideas Trends
skills.description: Proactive horizon scan for ideas, tools, and trends relevant to Matt's active projects and interests. Writes research to project memory; queues promising sparks to inbox. Use on weekly or monthly schedule, or when asked to scan for trends.

skills.name: Pain Points
skills.description: Track and research open project blockers. Pull pain points from memory, return fix briefs per hurdle. Use on schedule or when resolving blockers.

skills.name: Project Memory
skills.description: Read and write git-tracked project memory at .memory/project.json. Use before acting on any Cortex project and after meaningful changes (ideas, decisions, pain points, research).

skills.name: Presentation Hook
skills.description: Behavioural contract for how agents communicate with Matt — clarifying questions, plan structure, and output style. Apply to every agent interaction in the Cortex system.
